title: Participant Registration Open
description: Official registration desk opens for all AABW 2026 participants. Collect your badge, welcome kit, and event materials.

title: Breakfast & Networking
description: Morning breakfast service with light networking before the opening ceremony. Complimentary for all registered participants.

title: Opening Ceremony & Keynote
description: Official kickoff of AABW 2026 with welcome remarks from organizers and an inspiring keynote on the future of agentic AI.

title: AWS Partner Workshop: Building with Bedrock
description: Hands-on workshop with AWS engineers covering Amazon Bedrock for building production-ready generative AI applications. Bring your laptop.

title: Google Cloud Workshop: Gemini API Masterclass
description: Deep dive into the Gemini API with Google Cloud engineers, covering multimodal inputs, grounding, and function calling patterns.

title: Lunch Service Window
description: Lunch service open from 12:00 to 13:00. Complimentary buffet for all participants — claim your meal within the window.

title: Microsoft Azure Workshop: AI Studio Deep Dive
description: Explore Azure AI Studio for building, evaluating, and deploying custom AI models. Microsoft engineers will walk through real-world use cases.

title: Hackathon Officially Begins
description: The AABW 2026 hackathon countdown starts now. Organizers will announce themes, rules, judging criteria, and prize categories.

title: Team Formation & Idea Pitching
description: Solo participants and groups pitch project ideas in 60 seconds and form teams. Facilitated by event organizers.

title: Welcome Dinner & Mixer
description: Complimentary welcome dinner on the rooftop. Great opportunity to connect with fellow hackers, mentors, and sponsors over food and drinks.

title: Late-night Snack Window
description: Late-night snacks and beverages available for participants continuing to hack into the night. First come, first served.

title: Morning Coffee & Check-in
description: Grab your morning coffee and light breakfast before Day 2 workshops begin. Attendance check-in also open at this time.

title: MongoDB Atlas Workshop: Vector Search for AI Apps
description: Learn how to leverage MongoDB Atlas vector search to build retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) applications. Includes a live coding demo.

title: Vercel Workshop: Deploying AI Apps at Scale
description: Vercel engineers cover best practices for deploying AI-powered Next.js apps at scale, including edge functions and streaming responses.

title: Anthropic Workshop: Claude API & Prompt Engineering
description: Anthropic experts walk through Claude API capabilities, advanced prompt engineering techniques, and constitutional AI best practices.

title: Lunch Service Window
description: Day 2 lunch service open from 12:00 to 13:00. Complimentary buffet — don't miss the window while hacking.

title: Tech Stack Integration Lab
description: Open lab session where participants integrate multiple sponsor tech stacks into their hackathon projects with mentor guidance available.

title: Vercel AI SDK Hands-on Session
description: Deep dive into the Vercel AI SDK — streaming, tool calling, and multi-step agent patterns with live coding exercises.

title: Team Check-in with Mentors
description: Scheduled check-in for all hackathon teams to share progress, get unblocked, and receive feedback from experienced mentors.

title: Dinner Service Window
description: Dinner service open for all participants. Refuel before the evening hacking sessions.

title: Morning Stand-up
description: All-hands daily stand-up for hackathon teams. Share your progress, blockers, and goals for Day 3 in front of the full cohort.

title: OpenAI Workshop: GPT-4o Function Calling Deep Dive
description: OpenAI engineers cover advanced function calling, parallel tool use, and structured output patterns with GPT-4o for agentic systems.

title: Supabase Workshop: Real-time AI Data Pipelines
description: Build real-time AI data pipelines using Supabase's Postgres, Edge Functions, and pgvector. Hands-on with live data scenarios.

title: Lunch Service
description: Day 3 lunch service at Venue 2. Complimentary for all event participants — service closes at 13:00.

title: Midpoint Project Review with Mentors
description: Mandatory midpoint review — teams present their current progress to mentors for structured feedback and direction adjustments.

title: Community Networking Night
description: Mid-event networking social for participants, mentors, and sponsors. A chance to connect, unwind, and share ideas outside of building.

title: Dinner & Drinks
description: Complimentary dinner and drinks at the Sky Lounge Bar during the Community Networking Night event.

title: Morning Coffee
description: Coffee and light breakfast available before the final push building day begins. Fuel up for the last sprint.

title: Heads-Down Building Session Begins
description: Final full-day building session. Quiet hacking time — all teams focus on polishing features and preparing submissions.

title: Final Submission Form Opens
description: The official DevPost submission form is now open. Teams can begin filling out project details, links, and descriptions.

title: Mentor Office Hours
description: Last scheduled office hours with mentors. Sign up for a 10-minute slot to get last-minute technical or presentation advice.

title: Lunch
description: Day 4 lunch service. Complimentary buffet for all participants — service closes at 13:00.

title: DEADLINE: Submit Project Demo Video
description: Hard deadline for uploading your project demo video to DevPost. Late submissions will not be accepted for judging.

title: AI Night & Live Demos
description: Evening showcase where selected teams give live demos of their projects. Open to all participants, mentors, and sponsors.

title: Late-night Hacking Session
description: The co-working space stays open for teams burning the midnight oil on final touches before the morning submission deadline.

title: Midnight Snack Window
description: Midnight snacks and energy drinks available for teams still hacking. Stock is limited — grab yours early.

title: Breakfast
description: Final day breakfast service. Fuel up before Demo Day begins — service closes at 09:00.

title: Final Submission DEADLINE — All Projects Due
description: Absolute final deadline for all project submissions on DevPost. No extensions. Ensure your repo link, demo video, and description are complete.

title: Demo Day Preparation
description: Teams set up their demo stations and do a final run-through before judges begin their rounds. Tech check included.

title: Demo Day Begins — Team Presentations
description: All hackathon teams present their projects to the judging panel and audience. Each team gets a timed slot for demo and Q&A.

title: Lunch Break During Judging
description: Lunch service during the judging deliberation break. Complimentary for all participants — service closes at 13:30.

title: Judging Panel Deliberation
description: The judging panel convenes privately to score all projects across criteria: innovation, technical depth, real-world impact, and presentation quality.

title: Awards Ceremony
description: Prize announcements and awards presentation for all hackathon categories. Winners receive prizes from sponsors including AWS, Google, Vercel, and more.

title: Closing Keynote & Wrap-up
description: Final keynote reflecting on the week's achievements, community highlights, and what comes next. Farewell remarks from the AABW organizing team.

title: Celebration Dinner
description: Closing celebration dinner on the rooftop. Toast to five days of building, learning, and connecting with the AABW 2026 community.
